title: @codewithimanshu: $200 became $14,300 in 27 days. An Anthropic engineer watched it happen live. I was at Sightglass running my Polymarket
summary: @codewithimanshu: $200 became $14,300 in 27 days. An Anthropic engineer watched it happen live. I was at Sightglass running my Polymarket
whyItMatters: $200 became $14,300 in 27 days. An Anthropic engineer watched it happen live. I was at Sightglass running my Polymarket bot when he walked over. That is not a normal trading setup. No. It is not. Claude Code. Four open-source repos. $25 per month total. He pulled up a chair. I work on the agent team at Anthropic. We stress test Claude for workflows exactly…
